message:
fix(analysis): replace unwrap() with if-let in simulate_edge_removal

The in_degree HashMap lookup used .unwrap() which could panic if a
neighbor from the adjacency list was missing from the in_degree map.
Replace with if-let to silently skip instead of crashing.

Closes bd-toa0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
